n: Book 1, Chapter 9: A Message for Lothíriel

steps.t: The entrance to Dol Amroth is west of the Cave of the Avorrim. Dorthaneth has asked you to bring what she knows of the Heirs of Castamir and the Umbar…
The entrance to Dol Amroth is west of the Cave of the Avorrim. Dorthaneth has asked you to bring what she knows of the Heirs of Castamir and the Umbar…
You have presented yourself to the guards at the entrance to Dol Amroth and should now find Lothíriel in the Great Hall of the city.
You have presented yourself to the guards at the entrance to Dol Amroth and should now find Lothíriel in the Great Hall of the city.
